name: Date Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, sweetened condensed milk, water, butter, and salt in a heavy-bottomed pot. Cook over medium heat until the mixture reaches the soft ball stage (234 - 238°F).
2. Remove from heat and add chopped cherries and dates. Continue cooking until the mixture reaches the firm ball stage (245 - 248°F).
3. Add marshmallows to the mixture. Do not stir.
4. Allow the mixture to cool to room temperature.
5. Stir in vanilla extract until smooth.
6. Pour the mixture into a well-buttered, shallow baking dish.
7. Let it cool and set at room temperature before cutting into squares.
